notes: HAR-215 live read baseline for segment catalog/detail/count plus filter, filter suggestion, value suggestion, and migration roots. The segment catalog's opaque cursors, server-side query filtering, and the filter / suggestion / migration taxonomy cannot be reconstructed from local store state, so the de-seeded proxy forwards this read upstream and returns Shopify's response verbatim (it reads the real segment catalog rather than replaying a /__meta/seed snapshot). A scenario that has staged segments locally via segmentCreate is still served locally. Recorded live against harry-test-heelo (no /__meta/seed precondition); the disposable segment used for knownSegment is created and deleted during capture, so knownSegmentId tracks the live store. Search/sort grammar is intentionally limited to the captured arguments.
